channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Norway's Crown Princess Mette-Marit makes public appearance after lung transplant, marks World Cup victory
item.description: The article highlights the recent public appearance of Norway's Crown Princess Mette-Marit following a life-saving lung transplant. She was seen at Wembley for the first time since her surgery, coinci...

item.title: Sen. Ted Cruz Acknowledges Trump's Involvement in FIFA World Cup Decisions During Oval Office Event
item.description: During a ceremony marking the launch of 'Trump Accounts' in the White House, Sen. Ted Cruz (R-TX) openly admitted to President Donald Trump's alleged meddling in a FIFA World Cup game decision, sparki...

item.title: Richmound village moves forward after cult departure with greenhouse project
item.description: The village of Richmound, Saskatchewan, held a street party to mark a new era after two years under the influence of the Kingdom of Canada cult. Mayor Brad Miller symbolically broke ground on a commun...

item.title: UASU UON Chapter Supports Moi University Lecturers Against 'Parasite' Remarks by Acting VC
item.description: The Universities' Academic Staff Union (UASU) University of Nairobi Chapter has strongly condemned remarks by Moi University's Acting Vice-Chancellor, Prof. Kiplagat Kotut, who referred to lecturers a...

item.title: IAUE Senate Approves Leadership and Language Centers for Development
item.description: The Senate of Ignatius Ajuru University of Education (IAUE) in Rivers State has approved the creation of two new centers: a University Leadership Assessment Centre and a Centre for Languages, Digital ...

item.title: Delhi Gymkhana Club Eviction Case: High Court Seeks Centre's Response
item.description: The Delhi High Court has directed the Union government to respond to two petitions challenging the eviction order of the Delhi Gymkhana Club, a historic social and sporting club located near the Prime...

item.title: Airtel Africa's sustainability achievements and responsible growth strategy in Africa
item.description: Airtel Africa has made significant progress in environmental and social initiatives during its 2025/2026 financial year. The company reduced diesel consumption by 9.1 million litres by transitioning f...

item.title: Gilas Pilipinas Suffers Heavy Defeat Against Australia in Basketball Match
item.description: In a devastating performance during the FIBA World Cup Asian Qualifiers, Gilas Pilipinas suffered a crushing 43-point loss to Australia. The match highlighted significant defensive lapses and poor bal...

item.title: Christian Eriksen faces medical scrutiny after second pitch collapse as Ukraine friendly is abandoned
item.description: Professional footballer Christian Eriksen experienced a second cardiac episode during a match for Denmark, leading to the abandonment of a friendly against Ukraine. This incident occurs nearly five ye...

item.title: Durban July Fashion Show and Winter Nutrition Tips
item.description: The article highlights two distinct stories. First, it describes Moozlie Mabena's fashion-forward appearance at the Hollywoodbets Durban July event, where she channeled the iconic Esther Mahlangu in t...

item.title: Tanzania Accelerates Land Formalization to Boost Economic Opportunities
item.description: Tanzania is intensifying efforts to formalize land ownership nationwide, with the government committing to expedite land surveying services and title distribution to unlock economic opportunities for ...

item.title: Wimbledon Announces Heat Safety Measures for Tournament
item.description: Wimbledon is preparing for its hottest day of the tournament on Monday, with temperatures in south-west London forecast to reach 34°C and remain above 30°C for the rest of the championship. Organisers...

item.title: Father Regrets Buying Apartments for Children, Warns Against Spoiling Them
item.description: A father in Kenya has expressed deep regret over buying apartments for his children, arguing that this act undermines their character development. He believes that mortgages teach resilience, while pr...

item.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding marks the culmination of their public relationship
item.description: The article details the progression of Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's relationship, highlighting key moments from their initial friendship to their high-profile wedding. It includes photographs of th...

item.title: Federal employees face office space shortages as hybrid work policy expands
item.description: Thousands of Canadian federal public servants are transitioning to a four-day workweek in-office policy, but many departments face office space shortages delaying full implementation. The Treasury Boa...

item.title: Kano Police Impound 81 Vehicles for Missing Number Plates
item.description: The Kano State Police Command has impounded 81 vehicles for operating with covered, altered, or missing number plates as part of a statewide enforcement exercise aimed at improving public safety. Comm...

item.title: Sara Duterte's Impeachment Trial Defense: Confidential Funds Approved by Marcos
item.description: The impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte opened with her defense team challenging the House of Representatives' allegations of misuse of confidential funds. Lead counsel Sheila Sison argue...

item.title: Ferrari's Vasseur Maintains Caution Amid F1 Championship Contention
item.description: The article discusses Ferrari's strategic approach to the Formula One championship, highlighting team principal Fred Vasseur's reluctance to hype their chances despite recent successes. Ferrari, who h...

item.title: South Africa Appoints Ayanda Dlodlo as Ambassador to France Ahead of Presidential Visit
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa has appointed former state security minister Ayanda Dlodlo as South Africa’s new ambassador-designate to France, succeeding Nathi Mthethwa who passed away in September 2025. ...

item.title: Alexsandra Ann Diaz Sets Two Youth World Records at IWF Competition in Colombia
item.description: Alexsandra Ann Diaz, a young weightlifter from the Philippines, made history by setting two new youth world records during the 2026 IWF World Youth Weightlifting Championships held in Colombia. The co...
